name: Intune compliance policy to device resolution

statements.__comment: Policy assigned to a group: traverse group -> user -> device, scoped to current tenant
statements.query: MATCH (:EntraTenant {id: $TENANT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(policy:IntuneCompliancePolicy)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(g:EntraGroup)<-[:MEMBER_OF]-(u:EntraUser)-[:ENROLLED_TO]->(device:IntuneManagedDevice) MERGE (policy)-[r:APPLIES_TO]->(device) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = $UPDATE_TAG SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Policy applies to all users: match all devices with an enrolled user in the same tenant
statements.query: MATCH (policy:IntuneCompliancePolicy)<-[:RESOURCE]-(t:EntraTenant {id: $TENANT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(device:IntuneManagedDevice) WHERE policy.applies_to_all_users = true MATCH (u:EntraUser)-[:ENROLLED_TO]->(device) MERGE (policy)-[r:APPLIES_TO]->(device) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = $UPDATE_TAG SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Policy applies to all devices: match all managed devices in the same tenant
statements.query: MATCH (policy:IntuneCompliancePolicy)<-[:RESOURCE]-(t:EntraTenant {id: $TENANT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(device:IntuneManagedDevice) WHERE policy.applies_to_all_devices = true MERGE (policy)-[r:APPLIES_TO]->(device) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = $UPDATE_TAG SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Clean up stale APPLIES_TO relationships for the current tenant only
statements.query: MATCH (:EntraTenant {id: $TENANT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(policy:IntuneCompliancePolicy)-[r:APPLIES_TO]->(:IntuneManagedDevice) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted
